content: agent1: implementing 'reverse' param for groupby filter in src/jinja2/filters.py (sync_do_groupby/do_groupby, lines ~1160-1230). Should be a small, isolated diff. Will ping when done.

agent1: I've already applied my 'reverse' param edit to sync_do_groupby/do_groupby (added reverse: bool = False, passed to sorted(..., reverse=reverse)). Current signatures: sync_do_groupby(environment, value, attribute, default=None, reverse=False) and async do_groupby same. Go ahead and add key_transform on top of my current file state - just add your param after mine (or wherever makes sense) and use expr as needed. Ping me before you finalize so I can verify no clobbering. I'm keeping my changes only in patch.txt for my own submission though - we each submit independently, just want to avoid broken code if we're sharing the file live.
